description: LATERN 72Pcs 25CM Round Folding Paper Fans are suitable for summer wedding favours, holiday party fillers, summer family gatherings, birthday parties, table wall decorations, stage performance props, wedding gift souvenirs etc! Feature: - The white round wedding fan also symbolizes purity and beauty, is the perfect embellishment and decoration for summer weddings. - Made of high quality paper, polished exquisite, smooth opening and closing, lightweight and durable, not easy to wear, age, and break. - The paper fans are blank, and can be painted in any color, pattern or design as desired, to blend into the style of home, office or party. - Foldable design, easy to store and carry, the handle with a lock, can provide a firm fixation when closed and opened. - Suitable for children and adults, 72pcs handheld fans in total, ideal for cooling guests in places where ventilation is inadequate. Specifications: Material: Paper and plastic Shape: Round Color: White Folded size: 14.5cm x 2.1cm Unfolded size: 25.5cm x 22.5 cm Tips: 1.Handle and fold the paper fans gently, avoiding excessive force. 2.Keep the paper fans away from damp or high-temperature environments to prevent damage to the material. 3.Use the paper fans safely and avoid placing them near open flames or other flammable objects. Package included: 72 x White Paper Fans
